name: Brio Gold Inc.
description: Brio Gold Inc. is a Canadian mining company focused on the acquisition, exploration, development, and operation of gold properties in Brazil. The company's portfolio includes operating mines and development projects, such as the Fazenda Brasileiro, Pilar, and Riacho dos Machados mines, as well as the Santa Luz project. Brio Gold was established as a spin-out of Yamana Gold Inc. and was subsequently acquired by Leagold Mining Corporation in 2018.
